# Issue Finder — Discover GitHub issues worth contributing to

## Who we are
Issue Finder is a search tool built by Nischal Acharya that helps open-source contributors discover GitHub issues matching their skills and interests.

## What we do
- Search millions of GitHub issues by keyword, repository, or organization
- Filter by programming language, labels (good first issue, help wanted, bug), issue state, date range, and star count
- Sort by relevance, creation date, comments, reactions, or repository stars
- Personalized "For You" feed based on your interests
- Trending issues across the open-source ecosystem
- Save and organize issues with a Kanban board
- Track contributions and mark issues as done

## Key pages
- Home page: https://issue-finder.acharyanischal.com.np/
- Saved issues (requires sign-in): https://issue-finder.acharyanischal.com.np/my-issues
- Saved repos (requires sign-in): https://issue-finder.acharyanischal.com.np/my-repos

## Features
- Real-time GitHub API search
- Bulk selection and CSV export
- Analytics and insights on search results
- Keyboard shortcuts (press ? to see all)
- Dark mode with custom accent colors
- PWA with offline support

## Technical stack
- Framework: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui
- Database: PostgreSQL via Prisma
- Authentication: NextAuth.js with GitHub OAuth
- Caching: Upstash Redis
